{{Quote|I am Doctor Farnsworth and I am on Kashyyyk studying the local environment centered around Kachirho.|Farnsworth|<ref name="Rage" />}}
[[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] '''Farnsworth''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] who traveled to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] to study the environment around the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Kachirho/Legends|Kachirho]]. Sometime after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], when five of Farnsworth's [[environmental survey device]]s stopped transmitting, the Ithorian doctor enlisted the help of a passing [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]], whom he told to go find the survey devices and bring back their data to him. After the spacer completed this task, Farnsworth gave the helpful being 10,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] and a [[Clone Wars Painting (clone trooper)|painting]] of a [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]–era [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] for assisting him.

==Biography==
{{Quote|I would really like to get the data from my survey devices. Their memory banks are probably getting full at this point. Unfortunately, it is far too dangerous for me to go out and get that data manually.|Farnsworth|<ref name="Rage" />}}
[[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] Farnsworth was an elderly [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] who did a study of [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] [[Timeline of galactic history/Legends|history]]. During his historian career, Farnsworth had a [[Clone Wars Painting (clone trooper)|painting]] of an [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]] [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] dressed in [[Phase I clone trooper armor/Legends|Phase I armor]] commissioned.<ref name="Rage" />

After his tenure as a historian was finished, Farnsworth journeyed to the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] to study the local environment around the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Kachirho/Legends|Kachirho]]. Shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], five of his [[environmental survey device]]s stopped sending signals, likely due to [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmospheric]] interference. As a result, someone needed to go into the forest and download the memory from the devices by hand, but the area around the devices was far too dangerous for the aged Ithorian to travel through, being filled with a variety of [[Death/Legends|deadly]] predators, including [[Varactyl/Legends|varactyl]] and [[bolotaur]]s.<ref name="Rage" />

{{Gamemechanics}}
However, Farnsworth soon met a passing [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]], who—after Farnsworth explained his predicament—agreed to go collect the data from the survey equipment and bring it back to the Ithorian. After the spacer retrieved the information, Farnsworth gave the spacer 10,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] and his painting of the [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] [[Trooper/Legends|trooper]] as payment for the spacer's services.<ref name="Rage" />
{{Endgame}}

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|Hello. I do not think I have ever seen you before. You must be new here on Kashyyyk. Welcome.|Farnsworth, upon meeting the spacer for the first time|<ref name="Rage" />}}
Doctor Farnsworth was very polite when he conversed with the spacer, a being he had never seen before. When the spacer retrieved his survey data, Farnsworth both graciously thanked and paid the spacer for his helpfulness. The Ithorian also cared about the spacer, hoping that his helper would not get hurt while searching for the data. Farnsworth admired Kashyyyk's nature and forests, believing them to be a fascinating study and a lovely landscape.<ref name="Rage" />

Farnsworth had a wispy [[Color/Legends|white]] and brown beard, brown skin, and brown [[Eye/Legends|eyes]].<ref name="Rage" />

==Behind the scenes==
Doctor Farnsworth was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="Rage" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Farnsworth made his only appearance in the [[2005]] expansion pack [[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees|''Rage of the Wookiees'']]. In the game, he had a quest that the player could complete for experience points and other rewards. Although the player could choose not to do Farnsworth's quest and refuse his request for assistance, this article assumes 100% game completion.<ref name="Rage" />
